title: camera controls rework — RMB orbit, preset angles, figure interaction
description:
## Summary

- RMB drag = orbit camera (was: pan); short RMB click still opens context menu
- RMB + WASD = free camera steering (A/D azimuth, W/S elevation)
- Default phi 0.95 → 0.65 (more comfortable overhead view)
- Redesigned 6 camera presets: Draufsicht/Vorderseite/Links/Rechts/Standard/Hoch
- Selected figure inline quick buttons: POV, ↺ 45° left, ↻ 45° right
- Context menu: replace "Drehen…" tool-switch with direct 45° rotation actions
- Fix: `setActiveTool` init moved after `HINTS` declaration (TDZ crash T000362)
- Website: removed stale brett-v2 admin entry (already cleaned up in main)

**Note:** `brett/public/index.html` conflict resolved by accepting the mannequin-focus rewrite from main — the camera improvements apply to the old brett UI which has been superseded.

## Test plan

- [ ] Open brett, verify RMB drag orbits the scene
- [ ] Hold RMB + press A/D, verify azimuth rotates
- [ ] Click preset buttons 1-6, verify new German names and angles
- [ ] Select a figure, verify POV + ↺/↻ inline buttons appear
- [ ] Right-click a figure, verify context menu shows ↺/↻ instead of Drehen…

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
